Hello! Welcome! 👋

Let me give you a creative greeting using Python:
<details type="code_interpreter" done="true" output="{"stdout": "Good afternoon! \ud83c\udf89\n\nCurrent time: 2025-12-17 13:54:54\n\nFun fact: I can create charts, solve equations, process data, and even make ASCII art!\n\n============================================================\nHow can I help you today?\n============================================================\n", "stderr": null, "result": null}">
<summary>Analyzed</summary>
```python
import datetime
import random

# Get current time
now = datetime.datetime.now()
hour = now.hour

# Determine time of day greeting
if 5 <= hour < 12:
    time_greeting = "Good morning"
elif 12 <= hour < 17:
    time_greeting = "Good afternoon"
elif 17 <= hour < 22:
    time_greeting = "Good evening"
else:
    time_greeting = "Hello"

# Fun facts to share
fun_facts = [
    "Python was named after Monty Python, not the snake!",
    "I can help you with data analysis, calculations, visualizations, and much more!",
    "I have access to powerful Python libraries for almost any task you can imagine!",
    "I can create charts, solve equations, process data, and even make ASCII art!",
]

selected_fact = random.choice(fun_facts)

# Create a friendly greeting
print(f"{time_greeting}! 🎉")
print(f"\nCurrent time: {now.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}")
print(f"\nFun fact: {selected_fact}")
print("\n" + "="*60)
print("How can I help you today?")
print("="*60)
```
</details>
